prompt: Messy whiteboard/drawingboard visualization on dark background (#0a0e14). Hand-drawn sketchy style showing PARALLELIZATION concept. One human stick figure at the top/center launching or directing multiple small robot icons (4-5 robots) each going in different directions with arrows. Each robot has a small task bubble showing different work items. The robots are slower (small turtle icons or 'slow' labels near them) but there are MANY of them working simultaneously. Timeline arrows showing parallel tracks of work being done. Key visual: one human = many parallel workers. Whiteboard marker aesthetic, imperfect lines, like someone explaining delegation on a blackboard. Colors: orange (#f0883e), green (#7ee787), blue (#79c0ff) on dark background.
